creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text: By the way, it seems that freebsd-current@, freebsd-stable@ and devsummit@ are also subscribed to the freebsd-status-calls@ list, but would not receive any email because they do not want any where they are not in the To: or CC: field. Since the sendcalls script sends email directly to those lists, it is not necessary to have them subscribed to freebsd-status-calls@ and they can be removed from there.
